basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani has released the official notification for Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/M.Tech/M.Sc in Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, Neuroscience.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: B.Tech, M.Tech, or M.Sc in Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, or Neuroscience. Experience with Unity/Unreal Engine, VR/AR, or interactive game development and knowledge of Autism Spectrum Disorder and working with children/adolescents will be given opportunity.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000 per month for five years.

selection_process: Email detailed curriculum vitae Online interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
